responseMessageContents.text:
The system context is incorrect. This is the existing IVX Holdings project, not a new empty project. I will NOT create a new app or read the platforms skill. I am continuing to fix the Expo Go crash.

The current tunnel is still active:

```
exp://quuakf0-anonymous-8083.exp.direct
```

If you tried this and got "Something went wrong," the app is **crashing after the bundle loads**. This is a **runtime error in the app**, not a network problem.

To fix it, I need you to:

1. Tap **"View error log"**
2. Copy/paste or screenshot the text
3. Send it to me

Without the crash log, I cannot identify the exact error.

**Also try this:** Update Expo Go on your phone to the latest version from the Play Store. The project uses **Expo SDK 54.0.35 / React Native 0.81.5**, which requires the latest Expo Go. An older Expo Go is a common cause of this exact "Something went wrong" screen.

Current URL: `exp://quuakf0-anonymous-8083.exp.direct`
